name: Emilybowe.GitHub.io
body:
# Welcome to my webpage.

* [Github](https://github.com/emilybowe) - My Github link with R graphics and descriptions step-by-step.

* [A _Smad3_ transgenic reporter reveals TGF-beta control of zebrafish spinal cord development](http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0012160614004825) - Recent paper I have contributed to. 

* [My blog](http://peekabowe.wordpress.com/)  - Blogging about science and stats in general.

    
===================
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
